description: Message ordering (codex Phase-4): send three self messages and assert the persisted dump returns them in timestamp-ascending order (ord-1 before ord-2 before ord-3). Hermetic data-layer check using only send_text + the message_order assertion. No echo peer needed. #18: each text carries a shared per-run {{nonce}} — the three stay distinct from each other (ord-1/ord-2/ord-3 prefixes) AND unique across runs, so a cross-run survivor can't make a text ambiguous.
